title: CF_DocCentralV3_UseReservedNumber — Response Schema
description: Output returned by CF_DocCentralV3_UseReservedNumber to CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument. The flow always returns a structured response — it never throws an unhandled exception to the caller. A success response means the number is validated and ready; the reserved number item has NOT been deleted yet.

oneOf.title: Success response
oneOf.description: Returned when all validation rules pass. The reserved number exists, matches the requested year, matches the active year in App Config, and has not already been used in Svi predmeti.

delovodniBroj.description: The formatted registry number from the reserved number item. Use this as the DelovodniBroj value when creating the Svi predmeti item.

reservedNumberId.description: The SharePoint item ID from RezervisaniBrojevi. The caller must use this ID to delete the item after successful document creation.

filingDateSuggestion.description: Optional. Suggested filing date stored on the reserved number item (column UNKNOWN). Empty if not present. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD).

correlationId.description: Correlation ID used for this operation's audit log entries.

oneOf.title: Failure response
oneOf.description: Returned when any validation rule fails. The caller must stop document creation and NOT delete the reserved number.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID, if resolved before the failure.

examples: Rezervisani broj nije pronađen u listi.
Godina rezervisanog broja ne odgovara traženoj godini.
Tražena godina nije aktivna godina zavođenja.

examples.message: Rezervisani broj nije pronađen u listi.

callerGuidance.description: How CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument must handle this response.
rules: If success = false, stop document creation immediately. Return failure to the Canvas App. Do NOT delete the reserved number.
If success = true, use delovodniBroj as the DelovodniBroj value for the Svi predmeti item.
After the Svi predmeti item and document file are successfully created, delete the RezervisaniBrojevi item using the returned reservedNumberId.
After deletion, log UseReservedNumber / Success / Info to AuditLog.
If document creation fails after this flow returns success, do NOT delete the reserved number — it remains available for the next attempt.
Never retry this flow from the caller — if it fails, surface the error to the user.

powerAutomateOutputDefinition.description: Output parameters to define in the Respond to a PowerApp or flow action.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True if validated, false on any failure.

outputs.name: delovodniBroj
outputs.description: The reserved registry number. Empty on failure.

outputs.name: reservedNumberId
outputs.description: ID of the RezervisaniBrojevi item. 0 on failure.

outputs.name: filingDateSuggestion
outputs.description: Suggested filing date or empty string.

outputs.name: correlationId
outputs.description: Correlation ID for audit log tracing.

outputs.name: errorCode
outputs.description: Machine-readable error code. Empty on success.
